issues.description: Rest action is missing conditional check. Effect text states 'if you have 1 or less Life cards' — this condition must be represented as a condition gate, not an unconditional action.
Second effect (Trigger with TrashFromHand and FlipLife) does not appear in card text. The DSL contains an extra effect that is not supported by the official card text.
Target scope should specify 'Leader or Character' — currently uses generic 'ChooseOwnCharacter'. Text states 'your Leader or Character cards'.
Rest action requires a conditional check for life count before being executed. Must add condition: HasLifeOrLess with value 1.
